title: Lymphoma | Hodgkins Lymphoma | Non Hodgkins Lymphoma | MedlinePlus
text:
therapy uses drugs or other substances that attack specific cancer cells with less harm to normal cells. Biologic therapy boosts your body's own ability to fight cancer. If you don't have symptoms, you may not need treatment right away. This is called watchful waiting.
